title: rhamnicastrum zeyheri
intro: Rhamnicastrum zeyheri, also known as the Zeyher's Rhamnicastrum or Strophanthus, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, the roots and stems of Rhamnicastrum zeyheri have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, contributing to its use in treating conditions such as hypertension, fever, and skin infections. Rhamnicastrum zeyheri can be prepared in various forms, including a decoction of the roots and stems, which is often used to treat its associated health benefits.
